implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Integrated single-agent objective for AD: The system must minimize "Jerk" (rate of change of acceleration) to ensure passenger comfort - Curvature constraints ($kappa$) must be...
The system shall satisfy: The system must minimize "Jerk" (rate of change of acceleration) to ensure passenger comfort
The system shall satisfy: - Curvature constraints ($kappa$) must be satisfied to prevent rollover or tire slip
The system shall satisfy: - Non-convex obstacle constraints must be handled using iterative quadratic programming (QP)
The system shall satisfy: [Conflict Scenario for Negotiation]
The system shall satisfy: - The SafetyAgent prioritizes "Passive Safety" and strictly enforcing safe distances and MRM execution
The system shall satisfy: - The EfficiencyAgent prioritizes "Smoothness" and "Speed" using the QP function to minimize Jerk
